user.title: Room Intercom
user.description: Set up Room Intercom. There is nothing to configure — pick your speakers later in the Room Intercom card.

abort.already_configured: Room Intercom is already set up.

init.title: Room Intercom
init.description: The browser microphone needs HTTPS. Room Intercom can serve a local HTTPS port itself. If another intercom (e.g. BMS Intercom) already serves this port, it is reused automatically.

data.enable_https: Serve a built-in HTTPS port for the microphone
